calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VWR INTERNATIONAL, LLC, DAWN SMITH's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation;

Defendants VWR International, LLC and Dawn Smith's motion to compel arbitration is GRANTED.

Plaintiff's objections to Defendants' evidence are overruled.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
